title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, the Sprinters Stakes is here!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Look, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look how proudly my visage is depicted on the
poster over there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But... it's a bit crooked. I'm going to go fix it.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Hey! Is King Halo really in the venue?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah! There she is! Over there! Get her on camera,
quick!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, I've been spotted.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I shouldn't be surprised.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It can be inconvenient, but my majestic first-rate
aura never fails to shine through even the thickest
crowds.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Come, Trainer! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, is that King? Man, celebs like her definitely
get the crowds going.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Haha! As they should! Hey, Kiiing! Give us a killer
win out there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You bet I will! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We hurry to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Welcome all! We're finally here to decide who will
be crowned victorious this fall for the sprint!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes the racer we've all got our eyes on,
the one who dominated earlier this year in spring!
The quee—I mean, King!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! That's right! All the attention rightfully
belongs to me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: King Halo, the first-rate Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Of course! My victory is certain!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We might as well enjoy ourselves and bathe in the
crowd's cheer and praises.
